title: Daily Technical Analysis Report - May 2, 2026
summary: A sample daily market brief covering major technical levels, trend bias, and price action notes. Replace this content with the current day's report before publishing.

outlook: Markets remain sensitive to risk sentiment, dollar direction, and upcoming economic data. Traders should keep position sizing disciplined around high-impact events.

markets.name: Gold
markets.trend: Short-term recovery while price holds above support.
markets.analysis: Gold is holding above short-term support. A clean break above 2345 may open room toward 2360, while a move below 2320 would weaken the current bullish setup.
markets.watch: Watch the 2320 support zone and confirmation around 2345 resistance.

markets.name: EUR/USD
markets.trend: Range-bound with sellers active near resistance.
markets.analysis: EUR/USD remains below nearby resistance. Sellers may stay active unless price closes above 1.0750 with momentum.
markets.watch: A daily close above 1.0750 would shift attention toward 1.0800.

markets.name: Crude Oil
markets.trend: Price is attempting to hold a higher-low structure.
markets.analysis: WTI remains constructive above 78.20. Buyers need a break above 80.10 to confirm renewed upside momentum.
markets.watch: Monitor inventory headlines and reaction near 80.10.
